creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
I submitted bug #243474 that updates devel/dash.el to 2.17.0. But after that I found this port is not compatible with this version of dash.el. That is, build of this port fails as following.

https://www.utahime.org/FreeBSD/poudriere/data/logs/bulk/curamd64-git/2020-01-21_04h07m09s/logs/mu4e-maildirs-emacs26-0.8.20180606_1.log

I checked upstream but there is no solution of this problem at this time.
